nasb.text: “But in those days, after that tribulation, the sun will be darkened and the moon will not give its light,

esv.text: “But in those days, after     that tribulation,     the sun will be darkened, and the moon will not give its light,

cnv.text: “當那些日子，在那災難以後， 太陽就變黑了， 月亮也不發光，

ccb.text: “大灾难过后， 太阳昏暗， 月亮无光，

csbs.text: “在那些日子里，随着那患难， ‘太阳就要变黑， 月亮也不发光，
